AboutPage.title: About author
AboutPage.description: Front-end developer with 2 years of hands-on development experience. Passionate about creating clean, efficient, and user-friendly interfaces. Constantly learning and exploring new technologies to stay ahead in the ever-evolving world of web development. Beyond coding, I lead an active lifestyle and believe in maintaining a healthy work-life balance. Quick learner, problem solver, and always eager to take on new challenges.
